title: 25.2 Heavy Legacy
description:
Workout 2 (Floor 1) Thursday

Time Cap 6 Minutes

Max Clean & Jerk

Athlete must make an attempt during the lift window

0:00 - 0:20 - Lift 1

0:20 - 1:50 - Reset 1

1:50 - 2:10 - Lift 2

2:10 - 3:40 - Reset 2

3:40 - 4:00 - Lift 3

4:00 - 5:30 - Reset 3

5:30 - 6:00 - Lift 4

Workout 4 (Floor 4 Turf) Friday

Time Cap 8 Minutes

35 GHD sit ups

16 Burpees over the bag

150’ Bag Carry

25 GHD sit ups

16 Burpees over the bag

90’ Bag Carry

15 GHD sit ups

16 Burpees over the bag

30’ Bag Carry

Workout 7 (Floors 2&3 ) Saturday

Time Cap 9 Minutes

5 Rounds for Time

6 Ring Muscle Ups

9 OHS

12 BJO (Step overs for 60+)

Workout 8 (Floor 2, Competition Rig) Sunday

Time Cap 14 Minutes

4 Rounds

2 Rope Climbs

6 Wall Walks

4 Snatches
